name: @flux/e2e-default
description: End-to-end test game for Flux (default client authority)

scripts.build: rbxtsc --project ./tsconfig.game.json --type game && rojo build default.project.json -o flux-e2e-default.rbxl
scripts.build:bundled: rbxtsc --project ./tsconfig.game.json --type game && rojo build bundled.project.json -o flux-e2e-default.rbxl
